ddls:
CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source being integrated */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., 'API', 'Webhook') */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'maintenance') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., 'created', 'updated', 'deleted') */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the data source being integrated
Unique identifier for each audit log entry
ID of the user who performed the action
Timestamp of when the action occurred
